item.title: KylePorterNS: Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 23min If you beat Rory *and* Scottie at each of the last 20 majors, you would have finished.
item.description:

1st (Masters) 1st (Open) 6th 1st (PGA) 1st (Masters) 6th 1st (U.S. Open) 7th 1st (Masters) 5th 1st (U.S. Open) 1st (PGA) 9th 2nd 1st (U.S. Open) 7th 1st (Masters) 7th 6th 7th
